environment_prompt: A serene Japanese garden. A lit stone lantern beside a koi pond with visible fish. A red wooden bridge arching over the pond. Maple trees with vivid red autumn leaves framing the scene. Soft warm afternoon light. Rocks and lush greenery surrounding the water. Behind the viewer, a gravel path leads to a traditional wooden tea house with sliding shoji screens. A bamboo fence and a stone water basin (tsukubai) sit along the garden's edge.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, eye-level standing view looking across the koi pond toward the red bridge.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a woman in a deep purple kimono with golden chrysanthemum patterns, hair in a traditional bun with a jade hairpin from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
